crime.value: Murder by blunt force trauma to the head
crime.quote: the gaping wound located at the rear of the dead man's skull

victim.value: Frank Bitterman, connected to cases requiring investigation
victim.quote: the name, FRANK BITTERMAN in capital letters on the folder surface

closed_world.value: Mainland Township and the Flemington Hotel area
closed_world.quote: Entering the Township by passing over a low bridge he turned on to the main street

resolution.value: Cases closed with arrests made, squad celebrating completion
resolution.quote: we made the arrest's. The two cases are closed

investigator.value: Detective Sergeant Kevin McKenna, professional police detective
investigator.quote: Detective Sergeant Kevin McKenna knelt down on one knee next to the victim

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence gathering delayed until proper conditions - detective waits for sunrise to examine crime scene thoroughly
clue_fairness.quote: It was still dark, making it difficult for him to see or gather evidence. He would wait. Sunrise was two hours away.

social_world.value: Police institutional hierarchy and mentorship - detective shaped by father and godfather both in law enforcement
social_world.quote: This and other things he had learned from his police officer father, Thomas McKenna and his godfather, Captain Robert Wallace.

investigator_wound.value: Detective's emotional involvement with witness who lost her job for helping the investigation
investigator_wound.quote: Holtz fired me... For giving you the security camera video tapes... Hey, I'm sorry
